emails.subject: Re: parking pass available for sale
emails.body: Re: parking pass available for sale How's everything going? Are you enjoying yourself? How's the new position? How's the family? Kevin

emails.subject: Re: parking pass available for sale
emails.body: Re: parking pass available for sale Kevin, We're doing very well in Seoul. It's been nearly a year since I first arrived, time flies. We've had a frigid winter and it's just starting to thaw out now. Work has been good, very challenging. I'll be in Houston during the week of Feb 20th on business. Why don't we plan to get together then. I'll follow up. Jung
